record.title: Our Track Record
record.body: Prestige Health Clinic is a private health training, created on September 04, 2017. We are located in Babadjou, Mbouda-Bamenda road, Behind Toumaka market, Bamboutos department, West region.

services.title: Our
services.consultation_desc: Our caring doctors put all their experience at your disposal to offer you the best diagnosis.
services.surgeon_desc: Qualified and experienced surgeons will use their professionalism to get you back on your feet.
services.labo_desc: We have a medical analysis laboratory with the best equipment
services.born_desc: In clean, welcoming delivery rooms, our midwives have delivered hundreds of healthy babies.
services.vaccination_desc: Regular childhood vaccination programs are organized in our health facility. Do not hesitate to protect your child !
services.kine_desc: Our massage therapist is a specialist in disturbed movement. His objective is to restore your body's 'functional capacities', like its ability to mobilize its limbs
services.dental_desc: Smile at life with gentle dental care performed in a clean, friendly setting !
services.radio_desc: Our medical imaging experts will offer you reliable ultrasound and radiology for your quest for well-being.
services.ophta_desc: The ophthalmologist will focus on the structure and function of your eyes, as well as the diseases and abnormalities that can affect them.
services.ortho_desc: The orthopedist will be concerned with the diagnosis and medical and surgical management of diseases of the musculoskeletal system, i.e., bones, joints, ligaments, muscles, tendons and nerves.
services.pharmacy_desc: Equipped with a variety of medications to meet any eventuality, our pharmacy is open 24 hours.
services.advice_desc: Mothers of children, couples, young people can benefit from advice and follow-up sessions organized by our health professionals.

experts.title: Our Experts
experts.body: Empathy, listening to the patient, understanding the patient's needs and giving time, making the right diagnosis and providing the right care are all essential to providing care. Our doctors embody this standard of professionalism.
experts.subtitle: Professionalism
experts.subtitle_body: We have the best care staff at your service.
experts.subtitle1_body: We offer the best rates to make healthcare accessible to everyone. Come check it out for yourself.

testimonies.title: Testimonials
testimonies.description: This is what our patients say about us.

test.body: They successfully completed my surgery in a clean facility, with a highly trained, experienced and professional team. Thank you for a great experience!
test.name: Asonfack Fernand

test1.body: For a long time I consulted doctors in vain. At Prestige Health Clinic, the right diagnosis was made and I received the right treatment
test1.name: Belomo Christian

test2.body: The midwives were able to reassure and encourage me during the birth of my first child. Their attention had a profound effect on me
test2.name: Stella Tchatat

test3.body: I had blurred, blurry vision that was getting worse over time. Prestige Health Clinic screened me for a cataract. Now I can see as clearly as before.
test3.name: Yufenyuy Fidelia

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.heading: Affordable Prices
pricing.description: In an effort to provide health care to all walks of life, we offer services at low prices.

card1.title: General Consultation
card1.subtitle: The doctor starts the consultation by analyzing the objective data (vital signs) and then the subjective data such as:

card3.title: Ophthalmologic consultation
card3.line: Interview: reason for consultation, medical history, possible treatments, symptoms...
card3.line1: Measurement of the power of your glasses
card3.line4: If necessary, additional examinations adapted to your case (OCT, corneal topography biometry, specular...)...

faq.title: Do you have
faq.description: Here are some frequently asked questions about our services from our loving patients. Should you have any other questions, feel free to reach out via the contact form below.
faq.ans: Yes, within the hospital we have a canteen that serves quality food at affordable prices.
faq.q1: Do you always have running water and electricity?
faq.ans1: Yes, in addition to the energy provided by CAMWATER and ENEO, we have reserve units that ensure continuity of service such as water tanks and a generator.
faq.q2: Are your hospital rooms clean and equipped with impregnated mosquito nets?
faq.ans2: Yes, as we care about your well-being, we make it a point of honor to keep our rooms and beds clean
faq.q3: Are the rooms secured by virgil
faq.ans3: Yes, 24h/24 security is ensured by a qualified and dedicated staff. So your stay with us will be most peaceful !
